name: Burnex
message: Burnex Corporation is a leading manufacturer of precision metal stampings and wire forms, offering both custom and standard metal parts for various industries since 1972. The company utilizes innovative technology and unique manufacturing capabilities, including Planetary Geared stamping and bending technology, to provide a wide range of forming possibilities. With a focus on design flexibility and short lead times, Burnex serves clients globally across sectors such as aeronautics, automotive, medical, and electrical. Their experienced team, with an average tenure of 18 years, ensures a high level of expertise and continuity in meeting diverse customer needs
